content:
Sagittarius August 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Publish the wider view, then root the home
Key Dates Solar eclipse New Moon Aug 12 (Leo, 9th house) / Sun into Virgo Aug 23 / Pisces lunar eclipse Full Moon Aug 28 (4th house)
Love 9th house eclipse widens the love story; the 4th house lunar eclipse deepens the home-and-family bond
Career Teaching, publishing, travel eclipse early; home relocation or family chapter late
Crystal of the Month Sunstone
Lucky Colors Sunlit gold, deep amber, warm crimson
Lucky Number 9
Affirmation I send the wider view out; I let the home settle deep.

This Month’s Energy

Sagittarius, August 2026 is eclipse season, and the eclipses work your belief and your home — the two ends of your fire-sign arrow. The New Moon in Leo on August 12 is a solar eclipse, falling in your 9th house of belief, travel, teaching, publishing, and the wider view — a turning point around a long-held story, a teaching project, a publishing milestone, or a meaningful trip. Then August 28 brings a lunar eclipse Full Moon in Pisces, falling in your 4th house of home, family, and inner foundation — a climax or shift around a relocation, a family milestone, or the place you call home. August’s pattern is: send the wider view out early, then root the home late.

Key Dates for Sagittarius in August 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Sagittarius Do / Avoid
Aug 12 New Moon in Leo — Solar Eclipse 9th house — fresh start in belief, travel, teaching, publishing, higher education; eclipse amplifies a wider-view project Do: publish the work, book the trip, teach the class, name the bigger story
Avoid: staying small when the wider view is calling
Aug 23 Sun enters Virgo 10th house season — career, public role, reputation through late September Do: claim the title, ship the public work, accept the role
Avoid: postponing visibility
Aug 28 Full Moon in Pisces — Lunar Eclipse 4th house — home, family, inner foundation climax; a relocation, family milestone, or home chapter reaches a turning point Do: sign the lease, list the home, set the family boundary, name what home means now
Avoid: reactive family confrontations
Aug 11 Venus enters Virgo (your 10th) Warmth toward career and public role through September; visibility becomes attractive Do: invest in your public image, sell the work, claim the role
Avoid: hiding the wider view from those who need it
Aug 19 Mars enters Sagittarius (your 1st) Your ruler enters your own sign — vitality, courage, identity-driven action through October Do: declare the new chapter, take the bold step, lead
Avoid: pushing past eclipse fatigue
Aug 30 Mercury enters Libra (your 11th) Friendship, community, and future-vision conversations move forward Do: widen the circle, share the future vision, mend the friendship
Avoid: isolating when community is available

Career & Money

For Sagittarius, August’s career story opens with the wider view. The solar eclipse in your 9th house on August 12 marks a turning point around publishing, teaching, travel, higher education, or a long-held belief project. Eclipse new moons in the 9th house often ship the book, ship the course, ship the trip.

After the Sun enters Virgo (your 10th house of career) on August 23 and Venus enters Virgo on August 11, the spotlight turns to public role and reputation. Then Mars (your ruler) enters Sagittarius (your own sign) on August 19 — opening a chapter of identity-driven, courageous action that runs into October. The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 falls in your 4th house of home — a relocation, family milestone, or home chapter may reshape the foundation that supports the work. Crystals for wealth can support the push; the practical move is ship the wider view, then root the home.

Love & Relationships

The solar eclipse in your 9th house on August 12 widens the love story — a long-distance connection, a teaching-together bond, or a shared worldview. Eclipse new moons in the 9th house often bring a partner who expands the horizon.

The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 falls in your 4th house of home and family — a climax around a shared living decision, a family milestone, parents-related threshold, or a relocation. Mars entering your own sign on August 19 boosts your magnetism through October. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting the wider view lead, then letting the home hold the new chapter.

Health & Wellness

Eclipse seasons stress the body, and Jupiter-ruled Sagittarius carries tension in the hips, thighs, and liver — areas ruled by the 9th house, where the solar eclipse falls on August 12. Treat the days around August 12 as a publish-or-travel recovery window, not a sprint.

After Mars enters your own sign on August 19, vitality returns — but Mars in Sagittarius can run hot; pace yourself through October. Sunstone, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with the sun, optimism, and personal power — a useful symbolic companion during a visibility-and-belief month. Jupiter-ruled Sagittarius tends to overdo; gentle hip-openers, walks, and liver-friendly hydration are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Sunstone

Why Sunstone fits Sagittarius this month. You are Jupiter-ruled and August hands you a 9th house solar eclipse (Jupiter’s natural house) plus a 4th house lunar eclipse — the wider view meets the home. Sunstone — traditionally tied to the sun, optimism, personal power, and joyful visibility — is the stone that mirrors your fire-sign nature back to you while the horizon widens. Where Amethyst would cool and Carnelian would heat, Sunstone radiates Sagittarius’ natural buoyancy exactly. The fire-sign arrow meets a stone that points it.

How to use it during August 2026. Carry Sunstone in your pocket for the 24 hours around the August 12 eclipse (9th house). Place it on your nightstand from August 24 to 28 (4th house lunar eclipse window).

Best date to use it: August 12, the solar eclipse New Moon in your 9th house — hold Sunstone over your solar plexus for 5 minutes of breathing before any publish, teach, or travel step that day.

Read more: Sunstone Meaning and Best Crystals for Sagittarius.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Sagittarius — August 2026

When: August 12, the solar eclipse New Moon in your 9th house.
Crystal: Sunstone.
Intention: Send the wider view out into the world.

  1. Cleanse Sunstone with breath or sound on the morning of August 12 — long water exposure is not recommended.
  2. Set the intention on the 9th house theme: write down one wider-view project — a book, a course, a trip, a teaching — you’re ready to send out into the world.
  3. Act in the 48 hours following the eclipse: publish, book, teach. Sunstone in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28: what home or family chapter needs to settle to support the wider view you’ve now sent out? Hold Sunstone over your heart during the eclipse.

Shop Sagittarius Crystals for August 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Sagittarius crystal guide for stones connected with optimism, courage, travel, and truth — including the Sunstone that mirrors your fire-sign buoyancy during a wider-view eclipse season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Sagittarius August 2026

Is August 2026 a good month for Sagittarius?

It’s a wider-view-and-home month. The Leo solar eclipse on August 12 (your 9th house) ships a publishing, teaching, travel, or belief project. The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 (your 4th house) brings a home or family climax.

How will the solar eclipse on August 12 affect Sagittarius?

It falls in your 9th house of belief, travel, teaching, and publishing. Expect movement on a long-held wider-view project — ship the book, book the trip, teach the class.

What does the Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 mean for Sagittarius?

It falls in your 4th house of home and family — a relocation, family milestone, or home chapter reaches a turning point. Set the boundary; sign the lease; name what home means now.

What is the best crystal for Sagittarius in August 2026?

Sunstone — it mirrors your fire-sign buoyancy while the horizon widens, exactly what a 9th house solar eclipse in fire-sign Leo demands. See the full Sagittarius crystal guide →

Why does Mars entering Sagittarius matter for Sagittarius in August?

Mars entering your own sign on August 19 opens a chapter of identity-driven, courageous action through October — vitality returns, magnetism rises, and the new chapter declared at the eclipse can be acted on.
